summary: Fix Batch 01 closes the Round 1 blocker. `executeExecution()` now reads the durable process once and republishes an environment-aware `process` summary alongside `environment` for execution-lane `running`, `checkpointing`, and both `failed` paths, while the failed branches still avoid mutating durable process status. The added client regression test meaningfully simulates the paired failure publication on an already-running surface and proves `rehydrate` and `rebuild` become enabled without reload; the requested isolation tests are present as standalone cases. The requested verify gate passed, and the test/convex diff scan showed additive-only changes with no weakening of existing Story 1/2/3 assertions.
